key.name: tickers
key.description: List of tickers to rotate through.

key.name: min-notify-map
key.summary: Minimum price notification thresholds per ticker
key.description: Notify when the price is at or below the ticker-specific value.

key.name: max-notify-map
key.summary: Maximum price notification thresholds per ticker
key.description: Notify when the price is at or above the ticker-specific value.
